reset.name: Reset database to a known state

scenarios.name: Golden path: user completes core flow
scenarios.given: Seed data exists and the first-party services are healthy
scenarios.when: The harness runs the core end-to-end proof command
scenarios.then: The real user flow succeeds with all expected side effects
scenarios.expected: Core flow passes with persisted side effects

scenarios.name: Stress path: burst traffic stays within thresholds
scenarios.given: Seed data exists and the system is ready for load
scenarios.when: The harness runs the configured load profile
scenarios.then: Latency and error rate stay within agreed thresholds
